untranslatable_reason: The signal requires detection of three declining momentum peaks with corresponding rising price peaks (double bearish divergence pattern). This multi-point divergence detection across sequential bars requires historical bar indexing and peak-valley analysis not available in the indicator set. MACD histogram crossover is a reasonable approximation but does not capture the specific three-peak divergence structure described in the source material.
translation_notes: Attempted to translate using MACD as momentum proxy with histogram/signal crossover to approximate bearish momentum divergence. However, the precise pattern recognition of three declining peaks with rising prices requires custom divergence detection logic not expressible with allowed indicators and operators. Consider implementing a custom momentum divergence detector or using rsi_14 peaks as an alternative approximation.
